# `mise bootstrap systemd`

- **Usage**: `mise bootstrap systemd <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs)

Manage systemd user services from `[bootstrap.linux.systemd.units]`

## Subcommands

- [`mise bootstrap systemd apply [-n --dry-run] [-y --yes]`](/cli/bootstrap/systemd/apply.md)
- [`mise bootstrap systemd status [-J --json] [--missing]`](/cli/bootstrap/systemd/status.md)
